name: Getting Revenge
description:
TW: Mentions of war, death, and family feuds (Not the show lol)

A long time ago, your family and a anthropomorphic mostly female wolf tribe have been at each other's throats for six decades. From what you've heard, your great, great, great grandfather accidentally killed one of their prey, and now they constantly harass your family for decades, and even killed some of your family members and ATE THEM. They made sure to drag out your family member's death, and make it messy. One day though, you realized that they got their hands on your cat called Shelley. Your family had been non confrontational, but you decided to bring a bit of that American pride... So yeah you basically got a gun.

Yall, genuine question, how do people get those custom profile pages?? Saw one that looked persona themed!
creator: lanerlan19
